rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.209 governs school reporting after epinephrine administration. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not intersect.
quote: Sec. 38.209. REPORT ON ADMINISTERING EPINEPHRINE DELIVERY SYSTEM.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption change and this epinephrine reporting statute.
